properties.displayName: Extended Sleep and Delay Commands for Evasion
properties.description: Detects extended sleep, delay, or timeout commands often used for sandbox evasion
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "timeout /t" or CommandLine|contains has "ping -n" or CommandLine|contains has "ping 127.0.0.1 -n" or CommandLine|contains has "ping localhost -n") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "System.Threading.Thread.Sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "[Threading.Thread]::Sleep") and (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\choice.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "choice /t" or CommandLine|contains has "choice /d" or CommandLine|contains has "/t 10" or CommandLine|contains has "/t 30" or CommandLine|contains has "/t 60" or CommandLine|contains has "/n 10" or CommandLine|contains has "/n 30" or CommandLine|contains has "/n 60") and CommandLine matches regex ".*(/t\s+|sleep\s+|Sleep\()\d{2,}.*"
